payload.answer: I’m not sure which 'Brutto' this refers to, so I would not save this as a durable memory yet.

entity_resolution.reason: The new note refers only to 'Brutto'. Existing context includes both a Brutto restaurant in London and a Brutto article alias, so the reference is ambiguous. The evaluative statement could apply to either, and should not be durably attached to the restaurant without clarification.

repair_options: Clarify whether 'Brutto' refers to the restaurant in London or the article alias.
If it refers to the restaurant, save: 'Brutto restaurant in London was better than expected.'
If it refers to the article, save: 'The Brutto article was better than expected.'
